TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi sealed SKColorspacePrimariesCicp extends System.Enum

Docs.summary: Specifies the color primaries of a color space using CICP (Coding-Independent Code Points) codes as defined in ITU-T H.273.

remarks.format:
## Remarks
`SKColorspacePrimariesCicp` represents the color primary codes defined by ITU-T H.273 (Coding-Independent Code Points). These codes identify the chromaticity coordinates of the red, green, blue, and white points that define a color gamut.
Use a value from this enumeration together with a value from <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp> when calling <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace.CreateCicp*> to create an `SKColorSpace` from CICP metadata embedded in images (such as AVIF, HEIF, or JPEG XL).
## Examples
```csharp // Create the sRGB-equivalent color space via CICP codes var colorSpace = SKColorSpace.CreateCicp( SKColorspacePrimariesCicp.Rec709, SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp.Iec6196621); ```

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp GenericFilm = int32(8)

Docs.summary: Color primaries for generic film (Illuminant C).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp ItuTH273Value22 = int32(22)

Docs.summary: Color primaries corresponding to ITU-T H.273 value 22 (EBU Tech 3213-E).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec2020 = int32(9)

Docs.summary: Color primaries for ITU-R BT.2020 and BT.2100 wide-color-gamut content.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec470SystemBg = int32(5)

Docs.summary: Color primaries for ITU-R BT.470 System B and G (European broadcast television).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec470SystemM = int32(4)

Docs.summary: Color primaries for ITU-R BT.470 System M (North American analog broadcast).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec601 = int32(6)

Docs.summary: Color primaries for ITU-R BT.601 standard definition television.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec709 = int32(1)

Docs.summary: Color primaries for ITU-R BT.709 high-definition television (sRGB primaries).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp SmpteEg4321 = int32(12)

Docs.summary: Color primaries for SMPTE EG 432-1 (P3-D65 display).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp SmpteRp4312 = int32(11)

Docs.summary: Color primaries for SMPTE RP 431-2 (P3-DCI theater projector).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp SmpteSt240 = int32(7)

Docs.summary: Color primaries for SMPTE ST 240 (early HDTV standard).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp SmpteSt4281 = int32(10)

Docs.summary: Color primaries for SMPTE ST 428-1 (D-Cinema Distribution Master).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Unknown = int32(0)

Docs.summary: The color primaries are unspecified or not recognized.
